$comment: Single source of truth for the shared R2 extension-distribution bucket (datalink-ext) and the client-repointing values. The PUBLIC HOSTNAME is the one TBD value (a subdomain ext.<domain> is being delegated to a Cloudflare zone); fill `public_host` once it lands, then re-render the repoint URLs (they interpolate datalink-ext.tegmentum.ai). Uploads do NOT need the hostname — only the read-serving + CORS + repoint do. The R2 credentials live in CI org secrets (R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID/R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY/R2_ACCOUNT_ID/R2_BUCKET), never in this file.
_public_host_hint: LIVE: datalink-ext.tegmentum.ai (R2 custom domain on the Cloudflare tegmentum.ai zone; catalog + artifacts verified served with correct cache headers).

repoint.$comment: Config-driven client repointing. Substitute datalink-ext.tegmentum.ai with `public_host` above. These are the values the demo + CLI + stock DuckDB use to read DIRECTLY from R2 (the host is never in the byte path).

cors.$comment: The browser demo origin (GCP, TBD) that is allowed to fetch artifacts from R2. CORS is a permission header, NOT a proxy hop — zero R2 egress is preserved. Edit allowed_origins when the demo origin is decided; cors.json is rendered from this. Apply with deploy/r2/apply-cors.sh.
cors._demo_origin_hint: the GCP demo shell origin, e.g. https://demo.ducklink.dev (Cloud Storage+CDN or Cloud Run) — TBD.
